subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-08-13
subcodes.first_line: There are many people who enter this Cause with some preconceived ideas and finding that their ideas cannot be engrafted
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @spiritual transformation, @love of God
